title: Modern Cozy Living Room
prompt: An open-plan, modern living room designed to convey warmth and comfort. Bright natural daylight flows in on a fresh spring day, illuminating oak wood details, matte black accents, and elegant dark natural stone elements. A cozy seating area with soft cushions, warm textiles, and a soft rug invites relaxation. Thoughtful décor, indirect lighting, and green indoor plants enhance the homely, welcoming atmosphere. Clean yet warm design, blending modern aesthetics with a sense of calm and comfort. --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 7 --profile oobj38t
